steps.title: Keep title and name together
steps.content: The blank falls between renowned and the name Fu Pei-mei. The phrase should form the uninterrupted title-like description renowned chef and culinary instructor Fu Pei-mei.

steps.title: Remove needless punctuation
steps.content: Choice A wrongly inserts a comma between the description and the name. Choice C wrongly places a comma between two joined descriptions. Choice D has that same internal comma and adds an unnecessary dash before the name. The answer is B.
